input_request.prompt: i want to go to the beach, show me some recommendation of swimwear

intent.primary_intent: find swimwear that feels like an extension of her work wardrobe rather than a separate fantasy look

recommendations.label: High-utility bandeau with grounded swim-trunk
recommendations.logic_summary: This is the strongest beach option because it keeps her familiar understated and photo-conscious energy while giving her swimwear the same practical calm as her work pieces: long line, dark base, minimal distraction, and easy beach-to-sunset transition.

pieces.styling_note: long and low on the torso, keeps the same calm as her work shirts and avoids cling-prone bright patterns
full-length or high-rise for coverage and photo stability, easy to pair with a cover-up if needed

recommendations.label: Full-length swim-trunk with long-line bandeau
recommendations.logic_summary: This is the most direct work-to-beach translation: long front line, dark neutral, simple construction, and easy to photograph. It feels like a day at the office and a poolside in one.

pieces.styling_note: keeps the torso calm and photo-friendly while still looking intentional
full-length coverage that reads more like work swimwear than a casual beach set

recommendations.styling_note: use a simple tote or crossbody so the swim set stays calm and practical rather than decorative

analysis.why_this_works_now: Her last message asks for swimwear recommendations, so the response stays focused on beach-appropriate pieces that feel like an extension of her current wardrobe rather than a fantasy look. The strongest answer is to keep the same understated palette, long-line logic, and low-distractability while moving into swim-specific construction.

pieces.description: charcoal high-utility bandeau with long low coverage and supportive underband, paired with black full-length high-rise trunks in a matte performance fabric

prompt.system: You are a Gemini Flash prompt generator for a virtual try-on image. Render a realistic, high-quality photo of the user in the requested outfit. Follow these strict rules: keep the subject exactly as described in the profile and headshot reference; match gender identity, age, body shape, face, skin tone, and hair precisely; never invent a different person; never crop the face out; never add extra people; never create fantasy styling; keep the image realistic and photographically plausible; use the outfit and scene context faithfully; keep the style calm, understated, practical, and photo-conscious; avoid cling-prone swimwear, bright patterns, low-rise trunks, and anything that feels separate from her work wardrobe; keep the overall look photo-stable and beach-appropriate; render the image as if taken by a professional beach fashion photographer with natural tropical lighting; emphasize matte fabrics, clean lines, and a calm beach-day aesthetic; avoid editorial exaggeration, dramatic poses, or surreal effects; keep the composition believable and wearable; use the headshot reference to anchor the exact face, hair, and body proportions; keep the outfit in the strongest recommendation: charcoal bandeau with black full-length trunks; keep the look low-bustion, long-line, and easy to photograph; keep the image photo-realistic and retail-true, not stylized or fantasy-like.
prompt.user: Create a photo-realistic virtual try-on image of the same woman from the reference photo wearing a charcoal high-utility bandeau with long low coverage and supportive underband, paired with black full-length high-rise trunks. She is 47, has broader shoulders, a fuller midsection, and slimmer legs, and she wants this look for a casual beach day. Keep her face exactly as in the headshot, with her natural hair, skin tone, and proportions. The scene is a sunny tropical beach, with bright natural light, soft sand, gentle sea breeze, and a relaxed daytime mood. Emphasize understated style, photo stability, and practical calm: long line, dark base, minimal distraction, cling-resistant matte fabric, and an outfit that feels like an extension of her work wardrobe rather than a separate fantasy look. Avoid cling-prone swimwear, bright patterns, low-rise trunks, and anything that feels out of place. Keep the image realistic, photographically plausible, and flattering, as if taken by a professional beach fashion photographer.
